channel.title: No-Code on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in No-Code on Arrans github.io

item.title: Mintplex-Labs/anything-llm
item.description: The all-in-one AI productivity accelerator. On device and privacy first with no annoying setup or configuration.

item.title: n8n-io/n8n
item.description: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.

item.title: TM9657/flow-like
item.description: Flow-Like: Strongly Typed Enterprise Scale Workflows. Built for scalability, speed, seamless AI integration and rich customization.

item.title: getmaxun/maxun
item.description: 🔥 The open-source no-code platform for web scraping, crawling, search and AI data extraction • Turn websites into structured APIs in minutes 🔥

item.title: GrapesJS/grapesjs
item.description: Free and Open source Web Builder Framework. Next generation tool for building templates without coding

item.title: teableio/teable
item.description: ✨ The Next Gen Airtable Alternative: No-Code Postgres

item.title: automatisch/automatisch
item.description: The open source Zapier alternative. Build workflow automation without spending time and money.

item.title: givanz/Vvveb
item.description: Powerful and easy to use cms to build websites, blogs or ecommerce stores.

item.title: givanz/VvvebJs
item.description: Drag and drop page builder library written in vanilla javascript without dependencies or build tools.

item.title: silexlabs/Silex
item.description: Silex is an online tool for visually creating static sites with dynamic data. With the free/libre spirit of internet, together.
